Barba-CV

Open JSON standard for structured CV / resume data.

Specification:
https://eurobotics-association.github.io/barba-cv/specification/

Schema:
https://github.com/Eurobotics-Association/barba-cv/schema/barba-cv.schema.json

Documentation:
https://eurobotics-association.github.io/barba-cv/docs/

Purpose:
Enable reliable CV parsing by AI systems and interoperability with ATS platforms.
